criteria.criterion: A durable worker handoff records current status, next steps, and known risks.
criteria.proof: handoff.json records summary, next steps, and known risks.

criteria.criterion: Accepted resume-safety criteria and a deferred compact/clear follow-up remain visible after resume.
criteria.proof: criteria list before/after resume must show accepted and deferred state.

criteria.criterion: A resumed manager records a decision based on durable replay/export/handoff/criteria state, not live chat memory.
criteria.proof: resumed decision payload must name replay, export, handoff, and criteria evidence.

criteria.criterion: Run the same resume drill with actual compact/clear only after handoff and manager permission are configured.
criteria.rationale: Follow-up after this Gate 5 QA slice; compact/clear is intentionally not used here.
